demo-vegetable-wholesale.name: Veggieland
demo-vegetable-wholesale.info:
Veggieland is a prominent fruit and vegetable wholesaler and fresh produce retailer based in Botswana, known for supplying both retail businesses and individual end-consumers.
Location: Main Warehouse: Located in Tlokweng, which handles bulk distribution. Molepolole Branch: Located at Lot 130, Borakalalo.
What they offer: Bulk Supply: They operate as one of the country's primary centralized agricultural wholesalers alongside entities like Mr. Veg, distributing to supermarkets and smaller vendors. Fresh Produce: They specialize in essential everyday vegetables including potatoes, onions, tomatoes, butternuts, carrots, and peppers.
Timing: Monday to Saturday, 8 am to 6 PM. Closed on Sundays.
